productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men HIghlander Brown Casual Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal loafers with a square toe design from the united colors of benetton will add an extra bounce to your steps. Since they have no laces, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease. Made from high quality leather, they are comfortable enough to be worn all day long. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or chinos for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Slightly square toe design for a more comfortable Fit Laceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Contrast stitch detailing for increased style and added structure Padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug fit Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Leather upper extended to the outsole forming the first layer External rubber outsole embedded onto the footbed and stitched to the outsole shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
